2.description: inspect distinct risk classes in skredrisikokvikkleireklasse to identify high risk class

5.description: identify buildings intersecting high-risk quick-clay hazard areas

6.description: compute centroid of Trondheim municipality geometry

7.description: calculate distance from each intersecting building to municipality centroid

8.description: collapse to one row per building with minimum distance

9.description: sort buildings by distance to centroid ascending, then by building ID ascending

final_sql:
-- STEP 1: query [kommuner]
SELECT kommunenummer, kommunenavn, omrade AS geom FROM kommuner_627ee106072240e99d2b21ec4717bf01.kommune WHERE kommunenavn ILIKE '%Trondheim%';

-- STEP BOUNDARY --

-- STEP 2: centroid
-- source_step: 1

-- STEP BOUNDARY --

-- STEP 3: query [kvikkleire]
SELECT omrade AS geom FROM kvikkleire_175185730654415d8841436d0d6999f2.utlosningomr WHERE skredrisikokvikkleireklasse = 'Høy' AND ST_Intersects(omrade, ST_Transform(ST_SetSRID(ST_MakeEnvelope(:minx, :miny, :maxx, :maxy), 4326), 25833));
guard_error: {"executed": false, "error": "tool_validate_sql blocked.", "reason": "Step 3 has exhausted its SQL repair budget (2 attempts). Produce a new plan.", "step": 3, "action": "query"}
